category_sources: source_facts.description says Zen Simulation of robot finding kitten; official site calls robotfindskitten a zen simulation and SourceForge categorizes it as Simulation Games.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is robotfindskitten; official site and GitHub repository use robotfindskitten.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official website; official GitHub README includes obtaining and building from source instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project links its Git tab to github.com/robotfindskitten/robotfindskitten, and the official site says development code is tracked at SourceForge.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, official website, SourceForge project details, and official GitHub README identify the game/simulation, terminal/curses interface, C implementation, and CLI package.
